meaning: n.节日,喜庆日,音乐节,戏剧节,喜庆,欢宴,欢乐adj.节日的,快乐的
examples: Not everyone approves of the festival.
The film festival takes place in October.
The Palm House is not the only festival venue with an unusual architectural history.
Tom Bird, the Globe to Globe festival director, spent months searching the world for Shakespeare performers.
